summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends by4.11%.the main contract I2309 closed 824. some traderswere active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see.
